lethalbreed.config.title: Lethal Breed Config
lethalbreed.config.option.follow_range.d: The distance at which zombies can detect and follow players.
lethalbreed.config.option.min_scale.desc: The minimum randomized size for spawned zombies.
lethalbreed.config.option.max_scale.desc: The maximum randomized size for spawned zombies.
lethalbreed.config.option.min_speed.desc: Minimum randomized movement speed for zombies.
lethalbreed.config.option.max_speed.desc: Maximum randomized movement speed for zombies.
Probability for a spawned zombie to be a powerful Mutant boss.
lethalbreed.config.option.minion_count.d: Number of minions spawned by a Mutant boss.
lethalbreed.config.option.mutant_tick.de: Speed at which mutant tentacles strike.
lethalbreed.config.option.kamikaze_chanc: Chance for a zombie to spawn carrying TNT.
Probability for a zombie to spawn with a weapon.
lethalbreed.config.option.weapon_enchant: Probability for a zombie's weapon to be enchanted.
lethalbreed.config.option.armor_head_cha: Chance for a zombie to spawn with a helmet.
lethalbreed.config.option.armor_chest_ch: Chance for a zombie to spawn with a chestplate.
lethalbreed.config.option.armor_legs_cha: Chance for a zombie to spawn with leggings.
lethalbreed.config.option.armor_feet_cha: Chance for a zombie to spawn with boots.
lethalbreed.config.option.armor_enchant_: Probability for a zombie's armor to be enchanted.
Distance at which zombies can hear sounds like footsteps or breaking blocks.
Ticks before a Kamikaze zombie explodes when near a target.
lethalbreed.config.option.kamikaze_power: The explosive strength of a Kamikaze zombie.
lethalbreed.config.option.sound_lock_tic: How long a zombie remembers a sound position in ticks.
lethalbreed.config.option.health_thresho: Health percentage below which a zombie will start to panic.
lethalbreed.config.option.continue_healt: Health percentage required to stop panicking.
lethalbreed.config.option.scream_interva: Time between panic screams that alert nearby allies.
lethalbreed.config.option.alert_range.de: Distance at which nearby zombies are alerted by a scream.
lethalbreed.config.option.stop_pack_size: Minimum number of nearby allies to stop panicking.
lethalbreed.config.option.cooldown_ticks: Cooldown in ticks before a zombie can panic again.
lethalbreed.config.option.flee_explosion: Distance to maintain when fleeing from an explosion.
lethalbreed.config.option.climb_vertical: Speed at which zombies climb up walls.
lethalbreed.config.option.climb_horizont: Movement speed while attached to a wall.
lethalbreed.config.option.build_cooldown: Delay between placing two blocks during construction.
lethalbreed.config.option.temporary_bloc: Blocks placed by zombies will disappear after a certain time.
Time before placed blocks disappear (in seconds).
lethalbreed.config.option.break_multipli: Multiplier for how fast zombies break blocks.
lethalbreed.config.option.min_break_tick: The absolute minimum time required to break any block.
